input.instructions: Propose a local search or hill-climbing refinement for the greedy solution. Given a set of K placements, suggest a method to swap or remove/add placements to see if the total sum of the board (after applying modulo to each cell) increases. Focus on the fact that the objective is the sum of (cell % 998244353).

variables.selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}

Question:
Propose a local search or hill-climbing refinement for the greedy solution. Given a set of K placements, suggest a method to swap or remove/add placements to see if the total sum of the board (after applying modulo to each cell) increases. Focus on the fact that the objective is the sum of (cell % 998244353).

results.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: Iterative swap and replacement local search
JUSTIFICATION: Swap placements to maximize sum of cell modulo values.
